decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_m34-sbs matches existing registry record route_m34-sbs (M34/M34A on 34th Street Busway) with consistent payload: Manhattan, SBS variant, 34th Street corridor. No different target record indicated.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M34 to be renamed M34 SBS

evidence_refs.source_quote: M16 to be renamed the M34A SBS for clearer passenger communication

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_m16-mentioned matches existing registry record route_m16-mentioned with consistent payload: M16 bus route on 34th Street, Manhattan, renamed to M34A SBS. No different target record indicated.
